fields.Name: YourMembership
fields.Description: YourMembership is an association management system (AMS) by Personify for small-staff associations and member-based organizations, providing membership, events, community, e-commerce, fundraising, email marketing, and career-center functionality on a single platform.

Areas.Name: Membership
Areas.Description: Member profiles, member types, membership plans, dues, renewals, and member directories.

Areas.Name: Events
Areas.Description: Event creation, registration, attendee types, sessions, tickets, CEU awards, and virtual meetings/webinars.

Areas.Name: Community
Areas.Description: Member-to-member networking: groups, connections, wall posts, messages, photos, feeds, and notifications.

Areas.Name: E-Commerce / Store
Areas.Description: Online store with products, orders, order details, and store-order workflows.

Areas.Name: Donations / Fundraising
Areas.Description: Donation transactions, donation history, top contributors, and fundraising campaigns.

Areas.Name: Email Marketing / Campaigns
Areas.Description: Email campaigns, campaign reports, campaign email lists, and campaign list duplicates.

Areas.Name: Career Center
Areas.Description: Career center (Ymc API surface): job postings, job alerts, job search, saved jobs, career openings, and job templates.

Areas.Name: Finance
Areas.Description: Finance batches and batch details, invoices, invoice items, and dues transactions.

Areas.Name: Content / Pages
Areas.Description: Custom pages, custom page versions, custom forms and custom form fields, markup rendering.

Areas.Name: Education / Certification
Areas.Description: CEU awards at event and session level for continuing-education tracking.
